alternative_titles: Dan Da Dan, داندادان, ダンダダン, دان دادان, Дандадан, 膽大黨
synopsis: Ken Takakura, a boy who is an occult fanatic who doesn't believe in ghosts, and Momo Ayase, a girl who doesn't believe in aliens, encounter overwhelming strangeness that transcends their mutual understanding...! An occult coming-of-age story!
